title: Obedience.
content:
The power of princes rests in the consent
    Of only those who are obedient:
    Which if away, proud sceptres then will lie
    Low, and of thrones the ancient majesty.
meaning:
"Obedience." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
